competitor_changes: Multi-currency invoicing in 35+ currencies including EUR, USD, CHF native
Real-time bank feeds for Barclays, HSBC, Lloyds, NatWest, Monzo, Starling
current_tool_status: No native multi-currency — EUR invoices require manual conversion and journal entries
Reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows takes 8–12 minutes; causes month-end bottleneck
compliance_changes: ExactSpend has SOC2 Type 2 and GDPR EU residency, VaultLedger has MTD VAT filing
notes: ExactSpend's IFRS 15 revenue recognition module is planned Q3 2025 — not yet GA; workaround required until then
Multi-entity consolidation requires ExactSpend's Advanced tier (£540/mo)
EUR invoice template customisation limited compared to dedicated invoicing tools
